name: Emergency Briefing
description: Urgent unplanned briefing: rapid setup, core statement, questions, close.

cues.label: Live — On Air
cues.notes: Start immediately. No pre-roll — stream may already be live.

cues.label: Opening Statement
cues.notes: Official reads prepared statement. Keep lower third with name/title.

cues.label: Additional Official (if present)
cues.notes: Second official or expert. Update lower third. Skip if not needed.

cues.label: Media Questions
cues.notes: Brief questions only. Wide shot. Clear lower third.

cues.label: Closing
cues.notes: Official indicates end. Stop recording immediately after.
